title: 1. **Steven Fenyves, CFP, CFS** - Valued Wealth Management Inc. 🔥 **HOT**

details: **21 years in practice** (founded 2005) = founder likely 55-65 years old **Solo practice with small team** = no clear junior successor **Named after service ("Valued Wealth")** not founder = potential rebrand for sale **Serves "successful professionals preparing for retirement"** = mature client base **Boca Raton location** = affluent retirement market

title: Cold Email Opener:
details: I came across Valued Wealth Management and saw you founded the practice in 2005. That's 21 years serving Boca Raton professionals—impressive longevity in a competitive market. I'm reaching out because I work with advisors in similar positions: solo practice owners who've built something valuable over 20+ years and are now thinking about what the next 5-10 years look like. Most tell me they're great at retirement planning for clients, but haven't addressed their own practice succession. Some want to keep working but need a continuity plan. Others are ready to transition but don't want to hand clients to a PE aggregator. I'm not a broker or roll-up. I'm a practicing advisor exploring strategic partnerships with established solo practitioners where we can ensure client continuity while giving the founder a smooth exit path and fair valuation. Would you be open to a confidential conversation? Even if succession is years away, most advisors tell me the earlier they start planning, the better the outcome. [Your Contact Info]

title: 5 Solo/Small CPA Firms Serving High-Income Business Owners
Client Focus:
details: High-income business owners ($500K+ annual income) Global entrepreneurs with international footprint Puerto Rico Act 60 tax optimization specialists Multi-entity structuring for tax reduction Bilingual team (English/Spanish)

title: Why Perfect:
details: ✅ Explicitly markets to "high-income business owners, investors, and global entrepreneurs" ✅ Strategic tax planning focus (not just compliance) ✅ Act 60 expertise = clients considering major wealth moves ✅ **No mention of advisor partnerships on website or LinkedIn** ✅ Bilingual = Miami Latin American market overlap

title: Opening Line:
details: "Victor, I came across your work with high-income entrepreneurs and Act 60 relocations—impressive niche. I'm a wealth advisor in Miami working with similar clients (business owners scaling 7-8 figures, often with international exposure). I'm finding that most of my clients' CPAs focus on compliance, not strategy. You clearly do both. That's rare. I'm curious if you've built referral relationships with advisors who complement your tax work—estate planning, investment structuring, insurance optimization, etc. Many of my CPA relationships are informal, but the best ones are intentional. Would you be open to a quick call to explore whether there's a fit? Not looking to pitch you—just comparing notes on how we each serve this market."
